scripts.mobile:build: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.mobile:apk: npm run mobile:build && cd android && JAVA_HOME=$HOME/.local/share/neuroquest-mobile-tools/jdk-21 ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Android/Sdk ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=$HOME/Android/Sdk PATH=/usr/local/bin:$HOME/.local/share/neuroquest-mobile-tools/jdk-21/bin:$HOME/Android/Sdk/platform-tools:$PATH ./gradlew assembleDebug
